creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text:
It tries to use (qt6-)webengine here, but fails:
QtWebEngine: /usr/local/lib/qt6/libQt6Positioning.so.6: Undefined symbol "_ZNK9Q[…]x256EE@Qt_6_PRIVATE_API"
so it seems to me, that some part of qt6 didn't got rebuild or reinstalled when it should have been (or some partial update situation)
